OBJECT Table 17 G/L Entry
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=05/22/23;
    Time=10:30:47 AM;
    Version List=NAVW16.00,N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=G/L Entry;
    LookupPageID=Page20;
    DrillDownPageID=Page20;
  }
  FIELDS
  {
    { 1   ;   ;Entry No.           ;Integer       ;CaptionML=ENU=Entry No. }
    { 3   ;   ;G/L Account No.     ;Code20        ;TableRelation="G/L Account";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=G/L Account No. }
    { 4   ;   ;Posting Date        ;Date          ;CaptionML=ENU=Posting Date;
                                                   ClosingDates=Yes }
    { 5   ;   ;Document Type       ;Option        ;CaptionML=ENU=Document Type;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=" ,Payment,Invoice,Credit Memo,Finance Charge Memo,Reminder,Refund";
                                                   OptionString=[ ,Payment,Invoice,Credit Memo,Finance Charge Memo,Reminder,Refund] }
    { 6   ;   ;Document No.        ;Code20        ;CaptionML=ENU=Document No. }
    { 7   ;   ;Description         ;Text50        ;CaptionML=ENU=Description }
    { 10  ;   ;Bal. Account No.    ;Code20        ;TableRelation=IF (Bal. Account Type=CONST(G/L Account)) "G/L Account"
                                                                 ELSE IF (Bal. Account Type=CONST(Customer)) Customer
                                                                 ELSE IF (Bal. Account Type=CONST(Vendor)) Vendor
                                                                 ELSE IF (Bal. Account Type=CONST(Bank Account)) "Bank Account"
                                                                 ELSE IF (Bal. Account Type=CONST(Fixed Asset)) "Fixed Asset"
                                                                 ELSE IF (Bal. Account Type=CONST(IC Partner)) "IC Partner";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Bal. Account No. }
    { 17  ;   ;Amount              ;Decimal       ;CaptionML=ENU=Amount;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1 }
    { 23  ;   ;Global Dimension 1 Code;Code20     ;TableRelation="Dimension Value".Code WHERE (Global Dimension No.=CONST(1));
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Global Dimension 1 Code;
                                                   CaptionClass='1,1,1' }
    { 24  ;   ;Global Dimension 2 Code;Code20     ;TableRelation="Dimension Value".Code WHERE (Global Dimension No.=CONST(2));
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Global Dimension 2 Code;
                                                   CaptionClass='1,1,2' }
    { 27  ;   ;User ID             ;Code50        ;TableRelation=User."User Name";
                                                   OnLookup=VAR
                                                              UserMgt@1000 : Codeunit 418;
                                                            BEGIN
                                                              UserMgt.LookupUserID("User ID");
                                                            END;

                                                   TestTableRelation=No;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=User ID;
                                                   Description=PA035597, PA032441 }
    { 28  ;   ;Source Code         ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Source Code";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Source Code }
    { 29  ;   ;System-Created Entry;Boolean       ;CaptionML=ENU=System-Created Entry }
    { 30  ;   ;Prior-Year Entry    ;Boolean       ;CaptionML=ENU=Prior-Year Entry }
    { 41  ;   ;Job No.             ;Code20        ;CaptionML=ENU=Job No. }
    { 42  ;   ;Quantity            ;Decimal       ;CaptionML=ENU=Quantity;
                                                   DecimalPlaces=0:5 }
    { 43  ;   ;VAT Amount          ;Decimal       ;CaptionML=ENU=VAT Amount;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1 }
    { 45  ;   ;Business Unit Code  ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Business Unit";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Business Unit Code }
    { 46  ;   ;Journal Batch Name  ;Code10        ;CaptionML=ENU=Journal Batch Name }
    { 47  ;   ;Reason Code         ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Reason Code";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Reason Code }
    { 48  ;   ;Gen. Posting Type   ;Option        ;CaptionML=ENU=Gen. Posting Type;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=" ,Purchase,Sale,Settlement";
                                                   OptionString=[ ,Purchase,Sale,Settlement] }
    { 49  ;   ;Gen. Bus. Posting Group;Code10     ;TableRelation="Gen. Business Posting Group";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Gen. Bus. Posting Group }
    { 50  ;   ;Gen. Prod. Posting Group;Code10    ;TableRelation="Gen. Product Posting Group";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Gen. Prod. Posting Group }
    { 51  ;   ;Bal. Account Type   ;Option        ;CaptionML=ENU=Bal. Account Type;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=G/L Account,Customer,Vendor,Bank Account,Fixed Asset,IC Partner;
                                                   OptionString=G/L Account,Customer,Vendor,Bank Account,Fixed Asset,IC Partner }
    { 52  ;   ;Transaction No.     ;Integer       ;CaptionML=ENU=Transaction No. }
    { 53  ;   ;Debit Amount        ;Decimal       ;CaptionML=ENU=Debit Amount;
                                                   BlankZero=Yes;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1 }
    { 54  ;   ;Credit Amount       ;Decimal       ;CaptionML=ENU=Credit Amount;
                                                   BlankZero=Yes;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1 }
    { 55  ;   ;Document Date       ;Date          ;CaptionML=ENU=Document Date;
                                                   ClosingDates=Yes }
    { 56  ;   ;External Document No.;Code35       ;CaptionML=ENU=External Document No.;
                                                   Description=PA035901 }
    { 57  ;   ;Source Type         ;Option        ;CaptionML=ENU=Source Type;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=" ,Customer,Vendor,Bank Account,Fixed Asset";
                                                   OptionString=[ ,Customer,Vendor,Bank Account,Fixed Asset] }
    { 58  ;   ;Source No.          ;Code20        ;TableRelation=IF (Source Type=CONST(Customer)) Customer
                                                                 ELSE IF (Source Type=CONST(Vendor)) Vendor
                                                                 ELSE IF (Source Type=CONST(Bank Account)) "Bank Account"
                                                                 ELSE IF (Source Type=CONST(Fixed Asset)) "Fixed Asset";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Source No. }
    { 59  ;   ;No. Series          ;Code10        ;TableRelation="No. Series";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=No. Series }
    { 60  ;   ;Tax Area Code       ;Code20        ;TableRelation="Tax Area";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Tax Area Code }
    { 61  ;   ;Tax Liable          ;Boolean       ;CaptionML=ENU=Tax Liable }
    { 62  ;   ;Tax Group Code      ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Tax Group";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Tax Group Code }
    { 63  ;   ;Use Tax             ;Boolean       ;CaptionML=ENU=Use Tax }
    { 64  ;   ;VAT Bus. Posting Group;Code10      ;TableRelation="VAT Business Posting Group";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=VAT Bus. Posting Group }
    { 65  ;   ;VAT Prod. Posting Group;Code10     ;TableRelation="VAT Product Posting Group";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=VAT Prod. Posting Group }
    { 68  ;   ;Additional-Currency Amount;Decimal ;CaptionML=ENU=Additional-Currency Amount;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1;
                                                   AutoFormatExpr=GetCurrencyCode }
    { 69  ;   ;Add.-Currency Debit Amount;Decimal ;CaptionML=ENU=Add.-Currency Debit Amount;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1;
                                                   AutoFormatExpr=GetCurrencyCode }
    { 70  ;   ;Add.-Currency Credit Amount;Decimal;CaptionML=ENU=Add.-Currency Credit Amount;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1;
                                                   AutoFormatExpr=GetCurrencyCode }
    { 71  ;   ;Close Income Statement Dim. ID;Integer;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Close Income Statement Dim. ID }
    { 72  ;   ;IC Partner Code     ;Code20        ;TableRelation="IC Partner";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=IC Partner Code }
    { 73  ;   ;Reversed            ;Boolean       ;CaptionML=ENU=Reversed }
    { 74  ;   ;Reversed by Entry No.;Integer      ;TableRelation="G/L Entry";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Reversed by Entry No.;
                                                   BlankZero=Yes }
    { 75  ;   ;Reversed Entry No.  ;Integer       ;TableRelation="G/L Entry";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Reversed Entry No.;
                                                   BlankZero=Yes }
    { 76  ;   ;G/L Account Name    ;Text50        ;FieldClass=FlowField;
                                                   CalcFormula=Lookup("G/L Account".Name WHERE (No.=FIELD(G/L Account No.)));
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=G/L Account Name;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 480 ;   ;Dimension Set ID    ;Integer       ;TableRelation="Dimension Set Entry";
                                                   OnLookup=BEGIN
                                                              ShowDimensions;
                                                            END;

                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Dimension Set ID;
                                                   Description=PA035597;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 5400;   ;Prod. Order No.     ;Code20        ;CaptionML=ENU=Prod. Order No. }
    { 5600;   ;FA Entry Type       ;Option        ;CaptionML=ENU=FA Entry Type;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=" ,Fixed Asset,Maintenance";
                                                   OptionString=[ ,Fixed Asset,Maintenance] }
    { 5601;   ;FA Entry No.        ;Integer       ;TableRelation=IF (FA Entry Type=CONST(Fixed Asset)) "FA Ledger Entry"
                                                                 ELSE IF (FA Entry Type=CONST(Maintenance)) "Maintenance Ledger Entry";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=FA Entry No.;
                                                   BlankZero=Yes }
    { 5802;   ;Value Entry No.     ;Integer       ;TableRelation="Value Entry";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Value Entry No.;
                                                   BlankZero=Yes }
    { 5025350;;Exch. Parts Tax Amount;Decimal     ;CaptionML=ENU=Exch. Parts Tax Amount;
                                                   AutoFormatType=1 }
    { 5025351;;Branch Code         ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Branch Description";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Branch Code }
    { 5025363;;Main Area           ;Option        ;CaptionML=ENU=Main Area;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=" ,Parts Sales & Purchases,Vehicle Sales & Purchases,Service,Branch,Cash Register";
                                                   OptionString=[ ,Parts Sales & Purchases,Vehicle Sales & Purchases,Service,Branch,Cash Register] }
    { 5025364;;VIN                 ;Code20        ;TableRelation=Vehicle;
                                                   ValidateTableRelation=No;
                                                   TestTableRelation=No;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=VIN;
                                                   Description=VIN;
                                                   AutoFormatExpr='JMD' }
    { 5025365;;Book No.            ;Code20        ;CaptionML=ENU=Book No.;
                                                   Description=Book No.;
                                                   AutoFormatExpr='JMD' }
    { 5025366;;Veh. Source Code    ;Option        ;CaptionML=ENU=Veh. Source Code;
                                                   OptionCaptionML=ENU=" ,Sales Invoice,Sales Credit Memo";
                                                   OptionString=[ ,Sales Invoice,Sales Credit Memo];
                                                   Description=ID of vehicle sales invoice or vehicle sales credit memo }
    { 5025600;;Reposted            ;Boolean       ;CaptionML=ENU=Reposted }
    { 5025601;;Corrected           ;Boolean       ;CaptionML=ENU=Corrected }
    { 5025602;;Correction to curr. No.;Integer    ;CaptionML=ENU=Correction to curr. No. }
    { 5025603;;Reposting to curr. No.;Integer     ;CaptionML=ENU=Reposting to curr. No. }
    { 5025604;;Register Date       ;Date          ;CaptionML=ENU=Register Date }
    { 5025605;;Service Ledger Entry No.;Integer   ;TableRelation="Service Ledger Entry";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Service Ledger Entry No.;
                                                   Description=INC }
    { 5025840;;Factory No.         ;Code20        ;CaptionML=ENU=Factory No.;
                                                   Description=INC;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 5025841;;Main Group Code     ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Vehicle Main Group".Code WHERE (Make Code=FIELD(Global Dimension 2 Code));
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Main Group Code;
                                                   Description=INC }
    { 5025842;;Subgroup Code       ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Vehicle Subgroup".Code WHERE (Make Code=FIELD(Global Dimension 2 Code),
                                                                                                Attached to Main Group=FIELD(Main Group Code));
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Subgroup Code;
                                                   Description=INC }
    { 5025843;;Line Group Code     ;Code10        ;TableRelation="Vehicle Line Groups".Code WHERE (Make Code=FIELD(Global Dimension 2 Code),
                                                                                                   Attached to Main Group=FIELD(Main Group Code),
                                                                                                   Attached to Sub Group=FIELD(Subgroup Code));
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Line Group Code;
                                                   Description=INC }
    { 5025848;;Deleted G/L Account No.;Code20     ;CaptionML=ENU=Deleted G/L Account No.;
                                                   Description=PA032651 }
    { 5025849;;Import Costing No.  ;Code20        ;TableRelation="Import Costing Header";
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Import Costing No.;
                                                   Description=INC;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 5025850;;Amount to Reconcile ;Decimal       ;FieldClass=FlowField;
                                                   CalcFormula=Sum("G/L Entry Reconciliation".Amount WHERE (G/L Entry No.=FIELD(Entry No.)));
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Amount to Reconcile;
                                                   Description=EU.0000484;
                                                   Editable=No }
    { 5025851;;Cash Register Posting;Boolean      ;DataClassification=ToBeClassified;
                                                   CaptionML=ENU=Cash Register Posting;
                                                   Description=EU.0139128.130007 }
  }
  KEYS
  {
    {    ;Entry No.                               ;Clustered=Yes }
    {    ;G/L Account No.,Posting Date            ;SumIndexFields=Amount,Debit Amount,Credit Amount,Additional-Currency Amount,Add.-Currency Debit Amount,Add.-Currency Credit Amount }
    {    ;G/L Account No.,Global Dimension 1 Code,Global Dimension 2 Code,Posting Date;
                                                   SumIndexFields=Amount,Debit Amount,Credit Amount,Additional-Currency Amount,Add.-Currency Debit Amount,Add.-Currency Credit Amount;
                                                   KeyGroups=Acc(Dim) }
    {    ;G/L Account No.,Business Unit Code,Posting Date;
                                                   SumIndexFields=Amount,Debit Amount,Credit Amount,Additional-Currency Amount,Add.-Currency Debit Amount,Add.-Currency Credit Amount;
                                                   KeyGroups=Acc(Cons) }
    {    ;G/L Account No.,Business Unit Code,Global Dimension 1 Code,Global Dimension 2 Code,Posting Date,Branch Code,Gen. Bus. Posting Group,Gen. Prod. Posting Group,VAT Bus. Posting Group,VAT Prod. Posting Group;
                                                   SumIndexFields=Amount,Debit Amount,Credit Amount,Additional-Currency Amount,Add.-Currency Debit Amount,Add.-Currency Credit Amount,Exch. Parts Tax Amount }
    {    ;Document No.,Posting Date                }
    {    ;Transaction No.                          }
    {    ;IC Partner Code                         ;KeyGroups=Acc(IC) }
    {    ;G/L Account No.,Business Unit Code,Branch Code,Global Dimension 1 Code,Global Dimension 2 Code,Posting Date,Gen. Bus. Posting Group,Gen. Prod. Posting Group,VAT Bus. Posting Group,VAT Prod. Posting Group;
                                                   SumIndexFields=Amount,Additional-Currency Amount;
                                                   MaintainSIFTIndex=Yes }
    {    ;VIN,Book No.,G/L Account No.,Document No.;
                                                   SumIndexFields=Amount,Debit Amount,Credit Amount,Additional-Currency Amount,Add.-Currency Debit Amount,Add.-Currency Credit Amount,VAT Amount }
    {    ;Value Entry No.                          }
    {    ;Service Ledger Entry No.                ;KeyGroups=ENGINE }
  }
  FIELDGROUPS
  {
    { 1   ;DropDown            ;Entry No.,Description,G/L Account No.,Posting Date,Document Type,Document No. }
  }
  CODE
  {
    VAR
      GLSetup@1000 : Record 98;
      GLSetupRead@1002 : Boolean;
      DimMgt@1003 : Codeunit 408;
      _INCADEA_@1109400000 : Integer;
      __START_EXIT_POINT___@1008 : Integer;
      ExitPointSetupG@1007 : Record 5207300;
      ExitPointParamG@1006 : TEMPORARY Record 5207301;
      ExitPointUnitG@1005 : Codeunit 5207300;
      EPRecRef2G@1004 : RecordRef;
      __STOP_EXIT_POINT___@1001 : Integer;
      CompanyInfoG@1109400007 : Record 79;
      VehicleG@1109400002 : Record 5025400;
      ItemG@1109400001 : Record 27;
      AddCurrencyCode@1109400004 : Code[10];

    PROCEDURE GetCurrencyCode@1() : Code[10];
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      GetGLSetup();
      EXIT(GLSetup."Additional Reporting Currency");
      // Stop PA035901
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowValueEntries@8();
    VAR
      GLItemLedgRelation@1000 : Record 5823;
      ValueEntry@1002 : Record 5802;
      TempValueEntry@1001 : TEMPORARY Record 5802;
    BEGIN
      GLItemLedgRelation.SETRANGE("G/L Entry No.","Entry No.");
      IF GLItemLedgRelation.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          ValueEntry.GET(GLItemLedgRelation."Value Entry No.");
          TempValueEntry.INIT;
          TempValueEntry := ValueEntry;
          TempValueEntry.INSERT;
        UNTIL GLItemLedgRelation.NEXT = 0;

      PAGE.RUNMODAL(0,TempValueEntry);
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowDimensions@2();
    VAR
      DimMgt@1000 : Codeunit 408;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035597
      DimMgt.ShowDimensionSet("Dimension Set ID",STRSUBSTNO('%1 %2',TABLECAPTION,"Entry No."));
      // Stop PA035597
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateDebitCredit@3(Correction@1000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      IF ((Amount > 0) AND (NOT Correction)) OR
         ((Amount < 0) AND Correction)
      THEN BEGIN
        "Debit Amount" := Amount;
        "Credit Amount" := 0
      END ELSE BEGIN
        "Debit Amount" := 0;
        "Credit Amount" := -Amount;
      END;

      IF (("Additional-Currency Amount" > 0) AND (NOT Correction)) OR
         (("Additional-Currency Amount" < 0) AND Correction)
      THEN BEGIN
        "Add.-Currency Debit Amount" := "Additional-Currency Amount";
        "Add.-Currency Credit Amount" := 0
      END ELSE BEGIN
        "Add.-Currency Debit Amount" := 0;
        "Add.-Currency Credit Amount" := -"Additional-Currency Amount";
      END;
      // Stop PA035901
    END;

    PROCEDURE CopyFromGenJnlLine@4(GenJnlLine@1000 : Record 81);
    VAR
      CorrectionOfGLEntry@1109400001 : Record 17;
      RepostingOfGLEntry@1109400000 : Record 17;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      "Posting Date" := GenJnlLine."Posting Date";
      "Document Date" := GenJnlLine."Document Date";
      "Document Type" := GenJnlLine."Document Type";
      "Document No." := GenJnlLine."Document No.";
      "External Document No." := GenJnlLine."External Document No.";
      Description := GenJnlLine.Description;
      "Business Unit Code" := GenJnlLine."Business Unit Code";
      "Global Dimension 1 Code" := GenJnlLine."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code";
      "Global Dimension 2 Code" := GenJnlLine."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
      // Start PA035597
      "Dimension Set ID" := GenJnlLine."Dimension Set ID";
      // Stop PA035597
      // Start PA035804.26223
      GetGLSetup();
      IF GLSetup."incadea Dimension Concept" THEN BEGIN
        "Dimension Set ID" :=
          DimMgt.GetDimensionSetIDAdditional(
            GenJnlLine."Dimension Set ID",
            '',
            GenJnlLine."Gen. Bus. Posting Group",
            GenJnlLine."Gen. Prod. Posting Group",
            GenJnlLine."Salespers./Purch. Code");
      END;
      // Stop PA035804.26223
      "Source Code" := GenJnlLine."Source Code";
      IF GenJnlLine."Account Type" = GenJnlLine."Account Type"::"G/L Account" THEN BEGIN
        "Source Type" := GenJnlLine."Source Type";
        "Source No." := GenJnlLine."Source No.";
      END ELSE BEGIN
        "Source Type" := GenJnlLine."Account Type";
        "Source No." := GenJnlLine."Account No.";
      END;
      IF (GenJnlLine."Account Type" = GenJnlLine."Account Type"::"IC Partner") OR
         (GenJnlLine."Bal. Account Type" = GenJnlLine."Bal. Account Type"::"IC Partner")
      THEN
        "Source Type" := "Source Type"::" ";
      Quantity := GenJnlLine.Quantity;
      "Journal Batch Name" := GenJnlLine."Journal Batch Name";
      "Reason Code" := GenJnlLine."Reason Code";
      // Start INC
      "Service Ledger Entry No." := GenJnlLine."Service Ledger Entry No.";
      "Value Entry No." := GenJnlLine."Value Entry No.";
      // Stop INC
      "User ID" := USERID;
      "No. Series" := GenJnlLine."Posting No. Series";
      "IC Partner Code" := GenJnlLine."IC Partner Code";
      // Start PA032441
      "Main Area" := GenJnlLine."Main Area";
      VIN := GenJnlLine.VIN;
      // Start PA041023
      // Start PA041023.87188
      // Stop PA041023.87188
      // Stop PA041023
      "Book No." := GenJnlLine."Book No.";
      "Veh. Source Code" := GenJnlLine."Veh. Source Code";
      // Start EU.0139128.130007
      "Cash Register Posting" := GenJnlLine."Cash Register Posting";
      // Stop EU.0139128.130007
      // Start INC
      // Start EU.0159621.159644
      IF (IsImporter OR ("Main Area" = "Main Area"::"Parts Sales & Purchases")) THEN BEGIN
      // Stop EU.0159621.159644
        "Import Costing No." := GenJnlLine."Import Costing No.";
        "Factory No." := GenJnlLine."Factory No.";
        IF (VIN <> '') AND VehicleG.GET(VIN) THEN  BEGIN
          ItemG.GET(VehicleG."Model No.");
          "Main Group Code" := ItemG."Main Group Code";
          "Subgroup Code" := ItemG."Subgroup Code";
          "Line Group Code" := ItemG."Line Group Code";
        END ELSE BEGIN
          "Main Group Code" := GenJnlLine."Main Group Code";
          "Subgroup Code" := GenJnlLine."Subgroup Code";
          "Line Group Code" := GenJnlLine."Line Group Code";
        END;
      END;
      // Stop INC
      IF (GenJnlLine.Correction) AND (GenJnlLine."Correction Entry Curr. No." <> 0) THEN BEGIN
        CorrectionOfGLEntry.GET(GenJnlLine."Correction Entry Curr. No.");
        CorrectionOfGLEntry.Corrected := TRUE;
        CorrectionOfGLEntry.MODIFY;
        "Correction to curr. No." := CorrectionOfGLEntry."Entry No.";
      END;
      IF GenJnlLine."Repost G/L-Entry Curr. No." <> 0 THEN BEGIN
        RepostingOfGLEntry.GET(GenJnlLine."Repost G/L-Entry Curr. No.");
        RepostingOfGLEntry.Reposted := TRUE;
        RepostingOfGLEntry.MODIFY;
        "Reposting to curr. No." := RepostingOfGLEntry."Entry No.";
      END;
      // Stop PA032441
      // Stop PA035901
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(GenJnlLine);
      GLEntryExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function", ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'CopyFromGenJnlLine');
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    PROCEDURE CopyPostingGroupsFromGLEntry@5(GLEntry@1000 : Record 17);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      "Gen. Posting Type" := GLEntry."Gen. Posting Type";
      "Gen. Bus. Posting Group" := GLEntry."Gen. Bus. Posting Group";
      "Gen. Prod. Posting Group" := GLEntry."Gen. Prod. Posting Group";
      "VAT Bus. Posting Group" := GLEntry."VAT Bus. Posting Group";
      "VAT Prod. Posting Group" := GLEntry."VAT Prod. Posting Group";
      "Tax Area Code" := GLEntry."Tax Area Code";
      "Tax Liable" := GLEntry."Tax Liable";
      "Tax Group Code" := GLEntry."Tax Group Code";
      "Use Tax" := GLEntry."Use Tax";
      // Stop PA035901
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(GLEntry);
      GLEntryExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function", ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post, 'CopyPostingGroupsFromGLEntry');
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    PROCEDURE CopyPostingGroupsFromVATEntry@96(VATEntry@1001 : Record 254);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      "Gen. Posting Type" := VATEntry.Type;
      "Gen. Bus. Posting Group" := VATEntry."Gen. Bus. Posting Group";
      "Gen. Prod. Posting Group" := VATEntry."Gen. Prod. Posting Group";
      "VAT Bus. Posting Group" := VATEntry."VAT Bus. Posting Group";
      "VAT Prod. Posting Group" := VATEntry."VAT Prod. Posting Group";
      "Tax Area Code" := VATEntry."Tax Area Code";
      "Tax Liable" := VATEntry."Tax Liable";
      "Tax Group Code" := VATEntry."Tax Group Code";
      "Use Tax" := VATEntry."Use Tax";
      // Stop PA035901
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(VATEntry);
      GLEntryExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function", ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post, 'CopyPostingGroupsFromVATEntry');
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    PROCEDURE CopyPostingGroupsFromGenJnlLine@19(GenJnlLine@1000 : Record 81);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      "Gen. Posting Type" := GenJnlLine."Gen. Posting Type";
      "Gen. Bus. Posting Group" := GenJnlLine."Gen. Bus. Posting Group";
      "Gen. Prod. Posting Group" := GenJnlLine."Gen. Prod. Posting Group";
      "VAT Bus. Posting Group" := GenJnlLine."VAT Bus. Posting Group";
      "VAT Prod. Posting Group" := GenJnlLine."VAT Prod. Posting Group";
      "Tax Area Code" := GenJnlLine."Tax Area Code";
      "Tax Liable" := GenJnlLine."Tax Liable";
      "Tax Group Code" := GenJnlLine."Tax Group Code";
      "Use Tax" := GenJnlLine."Use Tax";
      // Stop PA035901
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(GenJnlLine);
      GLEntryExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function", ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post, 'InitVAT');
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    PROCEDURE CopyPostingGroupsFromDtldCVBuf@94(DtldCVLedgEntryBuf@1001 : Record 383;GenPostingType@1002 : ' ,Purchase,Sale,Settlement');
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      "Gen. Posting Type" := GenPostingType;
      "Gen. Bus. Posting Group" := DtldCVLedgEntryBuf."Gen. Bus. Posting Group";
      "Gen. Prod. Posting Group" := DtldCVLedgEntryBuf."Gen. Prod. Posting Group";
      "VAT Bus. Posting Group" := DtldCVLedgEntryBuf."VAT Bus. Posting Group";
      "VAT Prod. Posting Group" := DtldCVLedgEntryBuf."VAT Prod. Posting Group";
      "Tax Area Code" := DtldCVLedgEntryBuf."Tax Area Code";
      "Tax Liable" := DtldCVLedgEntryBuf."Tax Liable";
      "Tax Group Code" := DtldCVLedgEntryBuf."Tax Group Code";
      "Use Tax" := DtldCVLedgEntryBuf."Use Tax";
      // Stop PA035901
      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(DtldCVLedgEntryBuf);
      GLEntryExitPoint(Rec, ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::"Function", ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post, 'CopyPostingGroupsFromDtldCVBuf');
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@5025350();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EXITPOINT__@5025300();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPointCall@5025380(MakeCoddeP@1109400003 : Code[20];TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50];VAR EPRecRefP@1109400005 : RecordRef) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      EXIT(ExitPointUnitG.RunExitPoint(
        ExitPointSetupG."Object Type"::Table,
        DATABASE::"G/L Entry",
        MakeCoddeP, TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefP, EPRecRef2G, ExitPointParamG));
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPoint@1101992673(TriggerP@1119452001 : Integer;TypeP@1119432000 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1119432001 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.

      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(xRec);
      ExitPointParamG."Called CurrFieldNo" := CurrFieldNo;
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall("Global Dimension 2 Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE GLEntryExitPoint@5025451(VAR GLEntryP@5025453 : Record 17;TriggerP@5025452 : Integer;TypeP@5025451 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@5025450 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.

      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(GLEntryP);
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall(GLEntryP."Global Dimension 2 Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(GLEntryP);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_EXITPOINT__@1109400000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetGLSetup@1109400001();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA035901
      IF NOT GLSetupRead THEN BEGIN
        GLSetup.GET;
        GLSetupRead := TRUE;
      END;
      // Stop PA035901
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE IsImporter@5025800() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      EXIT(CompanyInfoG.IMSCheck());
      // Stop INC
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area GeneralLedger
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA031882   07.06.10 Deactivation of field Job No.
      PA032178   12.10.10 GL 730455: Changed Tablerelation from User to User Setup in field User ID
      PA032441   01.07.11 GC NAV 2009 SP1 W1 General Ledger Integration
      PA032651   31.01.12 GD 5022054: Added Field 'Deleted G/L Account No.'
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA033259   08.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA035343   02.12.13 SM On key G/L Account No.,Business Unit Code,Branch Code,Global Dimension 1 Code,
                             Global Dimension 2 Code, Posting Date Option MaintainSIFTIndex is set to TRUE to enable proper work of
                             Balance Per Period view.
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      PA035597   16.07.14 DR 25914: - Table Relation of field Dimension Set ID changed to "Dimension Set Entry".
                             - MaintainSIFTIndex=No removed
      PA035597   23.07.14 GL 26024 Changed TableRelation of field User ID to User."User Name"
      PA035901   09.10.14 TS NAV 2013 R2 General Ledger Integration.
      PA036547   20.10.14 GF Merge N.6.1.4 to N.7.1.0
      PA036356   15.09.14 GF Enhancement of several keys with "Gen. Bus. Posting Group", "Gen. Prod. Posting Group",
                             "VAT Bus. Posting Group" and "VAT Prod. Posting Group"
      PA035901   07.11.14 TS Length of Field External Document No. increased to Code 35.
      PA036547   20.10.14 GF Merge N.6.1.4 to N.7.1.0 - PA036356.
      PA036544   21.10.14 DR New ExitPoint added.
                             - All ExitPoint functions are defined as LOCAL functions.
                             - all FIND('-') and FIND('+') changed to FINDFEST, FINDFIRST and FINDLAST.
                             - Use the nerw Types "Inside x" and "Condition x" when necessary.
      PA041023   21.11.16 SV Created new field "Supply VIN" and "License No.".
      PA041023   02.02.17 KB 87188 Removed field "Supply VIN" and "License No." as they are not required.
      --- 7.2.0 ---
      EU.0000484 17.07.17 DT New field 5025850 "Amount to Reconcile"
      EU.0000039 17.10.17 UX 6348 Docu trigger correction.
      EU.0001175 17.10.17 UX 8305 Missing docu trigger for EU.0000039.6348
      --- 7.2.1 ---
      EU.0139128 27.05.22 AD 130007 Added new field "Cash Register Posting" and Modified CopyFromGenJnlLine()
                             to update "Cash Register Posting" field of "G/L Entry" from "Gen. Journal Line".
      EU.0147204 22.11.22 JN 149001 Removed unsued keys.
      EU.0159621 22.05.23 BS 159644 Added code function CopyFromGenJnlLine() for Import Costing for parts
    }
    END.
  }
}
